raw_consumer_statement:
Complaint Title : Wrong item received ; merchant refusal to resolve ; credit card issuer failed to protect consumer Details : On XX/XX/year>, I purchased an XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  ) XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX for {$1500.00}, paid with my American Express card. 

The outer box arrived factory-sealed, but inside was not the correct product. Instead, I received a used laptop of a different brand, scratched and missing the charger and documentation. 

I immediately contacted XXXX to report the issue. XXXX created a XXXX return label and scheduled pickup at my address in XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX never arrived, despite XXXX scheduled pickup attempts, all created through XXXX system. 

Because XXXX  never came, I could not complete the return within XXXX XXXX policy, even though I initiated the return immediately after delivery. 

XXXX refused to provide a refund because the return deadline passedeven though the failed pickup attempts were not my fault. 

I then disputed the charge with American Express, but XXXX appealed, and the bank sided with XXXX, even though I never received the product I paid for and attempted to return the incorrect item multiple times. 

I am requesting the CFPBs assistance. I am seeking a full refund for the item I never received. 

Thank you.
